title: Smithing Tweaks
description: Lets you upgrade any Vanilla piece of Tool or Armor to the next Grade
body:
# **Smithing Tweaks**
This mod will allow you to progressively upgrade any Vanilla Tools and Armor using the smithing Table.

**Note**: Older Versions of the Mod (Before MC 1.20.1 work different and have less stuff to upgrade)

 

(If applicable)  **The Upgrade Progress works like followed:**

Wood -> Stone -> Iron -> Gold -> Diamond

**Armor Progress practically works the same:**

Leather -> Chainmail -> Iron -> Gold -> Diamond

**Note:** Upgrading Leather to Chainmail Armor just requires an Iron Nugget, not a full Ingot

Every Upgrade **requires** a new **Upgrade Template** item, which is easily crafted using the following recipe:

![Upgrade Template Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae5f41dc236902aea7210296bf6fb75380d447ee.png)

Here's a simple Example of how to upgrade stuff:

![Upgrade Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c115d013b949d56cada24e9d933ecf835661c4dd_0.webp)


## Here's some more info in case you're wondering:
 _**What happens if I have Enchantments on my Stuff and want to Upgrade?**_ 

Just like the Vanilla Netherrite Upgrading, Enchantments stay on your Tools and Armor, so you don't need to worry about that.

_**I there a way to disable some recipes or change them up a bit?**_

As of right now, sadly there isn't. If you know what you're doing, you could go into the Mods JAR file and change or delete the existing recipes. Maybe I will add some configs in the future for you to customize it the way you want to.

_**Can I use this in my Project (e.g Modpack)?**_

You are free to do whatever you want with the mod!
